name: Almond Crunch Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup light brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix graham cracker crumbs, 1/3 cup sugar, chopped almonds and melted margarine; press into the bottom and up the side of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth. Blend in eggs, sour cream, pumpkin, and pumpkin pie spice.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour.
5. Turn off the oven; open the door slightly. Leave the cheesecake in the oven for 30 minutes.
6. Spread the Almond Crunch Topping over the warm cheesecake.
7. Broil 6 inches from the heat source for 2 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Chill at least 4 hours before serving.
ALMOND CRUNCH TOPPING:
1. In a small saucepan, heat margarine and brown sugar until dissolved. Stir in sliced almonds and flaked coconut.
